name: Cranberry Apple Bread- ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients in the order recommended for your bread machine.
If you prefer larger pieces of cranberries and apples, add them at the
"raisin beep" stage (if your machine has this), or when the first kneading
is almost completed.
2. Cook the bread on the Sweet cycle or the Basic cycle. Use fresh or frozen
thawed cranberries instead; if using, decrease the amount of milk and
check the dough's consistency a few times during mixing, adjusting with a
little more milk or flour as needed.
